seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North West Cape and North Wialki. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North West Cape vs North Wialki: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North West Cape and North Wialki.
heading: North West Cape vs North Wialki — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North West Cape, Western Australia and North Wialki, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North West Cape has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to North Wialki (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North West Cape or North Wialki safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North West Cape has a flood risk score of 59/100, while North Wialki scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North West Cape scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. North Wialki scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North West Cape or North Wialki?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North West Cape has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
